scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @sentinelops/shared && npm run build --workspace @sentinelops/api && npm run build --workspace @sentinelops/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @sentinelops/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @sentinelops/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @sentinelops/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @sentinelops/api" "npm run dev --workspace @sentinelops/web"
